name: relay
description: Relay persistent session handoffs: save, resume, list, park, sidekick, return, continue, and regen topic-bound records that carry distilled runtime context into later sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Carry distilled runtime context into the next session.
interface.longDescription: Relay turns a session's runtime artifacts into compact, resumable handoffs. Use /relay:save, /relay:resume, /relay:list, /relay:park, /relay:sidekick, /relay:return, /relay:continue, or /relay:regen to preserve the working model, decisions, next steps, and compressed exchange needed for another session to continue without replaying the chat.
